Rocky API implementation, code space reservation, JerryScript management, and RockyJS resource validation.

## Folders
- **[api](api/README.md)**: Rocky API implementation and definitions for Pebble firmware, including communication, graphics, memory, and utility functions.

## Files
- **[code_space_reservation.h](code_space_reservation.h.md)**: Reserves code space for future API implementation on the Rocky project, starting with 15K.
- **[jerry_port.c](jerry_port.c.md)**: Implements logging, console messaging, fatal error handling, and runtime context management for JerryScript.
- **[pbl_jcontext.inc.h](pbl_jcontext.inc.h.md)**: Defines macros and a structure for accessing JerryScript runtime contexts in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pbl_jerry_port.h](pbl_jerry_port.h.md)**: Functions to initialize and deinitialize the Rocky runtime context.
- **[rocky.c](rocky.c.md)**: Implements functions for initializing, evaluating, and managing JavaScript snapshots and resources.
- **[rocky.h](rocky.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing RockyJS snapshots and event loops.
- **[rocky_res.c](rocky_res.c.md)**: Functions to validate Rocky app resources and check for compatible JavaScript bytecode.
- **[rocky_res.h](rocky_res.h.md)**: Functions and types for validating Rocky app resources and checking bytecode compatibility.
